title: dioscorea nepalensis
intro: Dioscorea nepalensis, also known as the Nepal yam, is a type of vining plant that belongs to the yam family (Dioscoreaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dioscorea nepalensis include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. Dioscorea nepalensis can be prepared as a herbal supplement in the form of capsules or tablets, or as a decoction of the dried roots and tubers.
